subcodes.first_line: O my God! Each day doth the wolf seize one from among the sheep of God. How long wilt Thou observe and forbear? Verily justice [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کل یوم یفترس الذئب عنما من اغنام الله الهی الی متی تنظر و تصبر ان العدل
subcodes.subjects: @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @chastisement and requital, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
